#  | RoSCO

> RoSCO is one of many store-based establishments on the Roblox playform that strive to provide a realistic, interactive, and welcoming experince for all. Our staff and HR teams work hard to ensure that our visions are borught to life.

- [👋 Welcome!](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/index.md): 👋 Welcome!

## Staff Information

- [Store Jobs](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/staff-information/staff-jobs.md): This guide will outline the many departments BloxStreet staff members are permitted to work at, along with in-depth instructions on how to provide guests with the most pleasant experience possible.
- [Staff Promotions](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/staff-information/staff-promotions.md): This guide will outline all of the necessary information regarding promotions at RoSCO. Keep in mind that promotions are a privilege, not a right.
- [Shift & Training Times](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/staff-information/session-times.md): Here, staff members can find all of RoSCO's shift and training session times.
- [Rank Structure](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/staff-information/rank-structure.md): All of RoSCO's ranks and rank descriptions are found here.
- [Policies](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/staff-information/policies.md): Here, community members can find some of RoSCO's policies.

## Tickets

- [Ticket Creation Reasons](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/tickets/ticket-creation-reasons.md): TOC
- [Player Report Format](https://support.rosco.firxd.me/tickets/player-report-format.md): When creating a ticket for a player report, community members should use the format found below. Any player report not following the format will be ignored.
